meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Miora
products.tagline: Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory
products.summaryZh: 在可编辑画布上借助智能体记忆扩展你的创造力
products.descriptionZh: 不是又一个人工智能图像工具。Miora 是一个具备记忆能力的智能创意工作室。只需一个想法，即可在可编辑画布上生成多模态素材，将自动构建的记忆转化为可复用的技能，进而持续创作，始终贴合你的品味。一个人，就是一个完整的创意工作室。
products.description: Not another AI image tool. Miora is an Agentic Creative Studio with Memory. Bring one idea, generate multimodal assets on one editable canvas, turn auto-built memory into a reusable Skill, then create more, always true to your taste. One person, a whole creative studio.

products.name: JustVibe
products.tagline: The search engine for doing, with apps built for you
products.summaryZh: 面向行动力的搜索引擎，为你量身打造的应用
products.descriptionZh: JustVibe 是一款免费搜索引擎，旨在帮助用户高效完成任务。搜索“规划我的东京5日游”，即可立即获得一个功能完备、可交互的行程规划工具，专为东京定制，并直接在浏览器中运行。如果尚未找到理想的应用，JustVibe 可在数分钟内为你量身打造一款完全符合需求的应用。所有应用均可永久保留，无需编写任何代码。通过对话定制每个细节，并通过单一链接分享你的新应用。
products.description: JustVibe is a free search engine, built to help get things done. Search "plan my 5 day trip to tokyo" and instantly receive a fully functional and interactive trip planner, perfectly set up for Tokyo and running directly in your browser. If your perfect app doesn't exist yet, JustVibe builds a custom one for your exact needs in minutes. Every app is yours to keep forever, with zero code. Chat to customize every detail and share your new app with a single link.

products.name: FetchSandbox
products.tagline: API integration testing that remembers what breaks
products.summaryZh: 记住断点的API集成测试
products.descriptionZh: 大多数API测试止步于200 OK响应。FetchSandbox让开发者和AI智能体能够验证后续环节——Webhook、重试机制、状态变更、异步工作流及故障场景。它能复现真实缺陷、验证修复方案，并记录异常情况，使您的智能体在生产环境前即可捕获问题。通过MCP协议可连接Cursor、Claude Code、Windsurf、VS Code及Codex。支持探索60余种API——包括Stripe、GitHub、Clerk、Resend、Twilio、Descope、OpenAI——无需消耗真实API配额或等待预发布环境。
products.description: Most API tests stop at 200 OK. FetchSandbox lets developers and AI agents verify what happens next—webhooks, retries, state changes, async workflows, and failure scenarios. It reproduces the real bug, proves the fix, and remembers what breaks—so your agent catches it before production. Connect via MCP to Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, VS Code, and Codex. Explore 60+ APIs—Stripe, GitHub, Clerk, Resend, Twilio, Descope, OpenAI—without burning real API quota or waiting on staging.

products.name: Second Brain for AI v2
products.tagline: AI memory that connects the dots across every tool
products.summaryZh: 连接所有工具的AI记忆
products.descriptionZh: Second Brain 能记住你在 Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor、Codex 以及任何 MCP 客户端中的项目、联系人、决策和偏好。V2 版本会自动关联相关记忆，在回忆时追踪这些关联，并区分已确定的决策与草稿及过时上下文。开源且在你的 Cloudflare 账户中自托管。
products.description: Second Brain remembers your projects, people, decisions, and preferences across Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex, and any MCP client. V2 automatically links related memories, follows those connections during recall, and distinguishes settled decisions from drafts and stale context. Open source and self-hosted in your Cloudflare account.

products.name: ServiceBeard
products.tagline: Sync your mailbox with your issue tracker
products.summaryZh: 将邮箱与问题追踪器同步
products.descriptionZh: 将面向客户的邮箱转化为问题看板。ServiceBeard 将邮件直接同步至问题追踪器，让您能在现有工作空间中运行完整的服务台。您可沿用已配置的自动化流程，无需投资昂贵的按席位计费客服软件。该工具为开源项目，通过标准IMAP/SMTP协议连接，目前支持GitHub、GitLab和Linear。
products.description: Turn your customer-facing mailbox into an issue board. ServiceBeard syncs your emails directly to your issue tracker, letting you run a full service desk from your existing workspace. You can leverage the automation pipelines you’ve already set up without investing in expensive, per-seat helpdesk software. It's open-source, connects via standard IMAP/SMTP, and currently supports GitHub, GitLab, and Linear.

products.name: Offer Max
products.tagline: Every job application is a click, not an evening
products.summaryZh: 每一次求职申请，只需一次点击，而非耗费整晚。
products.descriptionZh: 找工作本身就是一份全职工作。Offer Max 让这个过程轻松许多。这款 Chrome 扩展程序可一键抓取任何职位描述。AI 会在你投递前评估匹配度，用招聘方的语言重写简历、起草求职信、自动填写繁琐的申请表格，并为你准备该团队可能问到的面试问题。只需一次性建立你的主档案，就能比其他人准备得更充分。
products.description: Finding a job is already a full-time job. Offer Max makes it a lot less painful. The Chrome extension captures any Job Description in one click. AI tells you how good your fit is before you commit to applying, rewrites your résumé in the recruiter's language, drafts the cover letter, autofills the tedious application forms, and preps you with the interview questions this team is likely to ask. Build your master profile once. Show up more prepared than everyone else.

products.name: LockIn for Chrome
products.tagline: Increase productivity with AI distraction blocking
products.summaryZh: 使用AI屏蔽干扰，提升工作效率
products.descriptionZh: 全新的LockIn Chrome扩展程序能让你的代理更好地为你屏蔽干扰。将明天的待办事项交给它，它会将这些事项作为任务添加到你的仪表盘中。然后打开笔记本电脑开始执行任务，所有与任务无关的网站都会被屏蔽，而你需要使用的网站则保持可用。
products.description: The brand new LockIn chrome extension makes your agent even better at blocking distractions for you. Give it your to-do's for tomorrow, it adds them to your dashboard as tasks. Then open your laptop and start a task, every site that is not relevant to the task gets blocked, the ones you need stay available.

products.name: Flowing
products.tagline: Ground your academic writing in your own papers.
products.summaryZh: 将学术写作立足于你自己的论文。
products.descriptionZh: Flowing 是一款桌面写作工具，能将你的研究资料库融入写作流程。写作时，它会高亮关键术语，从你的 PDF 中调取相关段落，并允许你基于自己的论文进行提问、润色和续写，提供建议。相比 ChatGPT 这类通用 AI 助手，它能带来更高的准确性和一致性。研究写作不只是生成流畅的文字，更在于忠于你的证据——这正是 Flowing 的设计初衷。
products.description: Flowing is a desktop writing tool that keeps your research library in the writing loop. As you write, it highlights key terms, recalls relevant passages from your PDFs, and lets you ask, polish, and continue writing with suggestions grounded in your own papers, helping deliver better accuracy and alignment than generic AI assistants like ChatGPT. Research writing isn't just about generating fluent text. It's about staying faithful to your evidence. That's exactly what Flowing is designed for.

products.name: AI Visibility
products.tagline: Check how ChatGPT, Gemini and Claude talk about your brand
products.summaryZh: 查看ChatGPT、Gemini和Claude如何谈论你的品牌
products.descriptionZh: 你的客户在打开谷歌之前，就已经问过ChatGPT、Gemini、Perplexity和Claude了。AI可见性功能会检查这些AI助手如何谈论你的品牌：它们是否提到你，提到了谁，以及它们信任哪些来源。你会得到一个可见性评分、一份竞争对手排名、一份针对你网站的AEO审计报告，以及一份当天就能执行的修复清单。任何品牌和网站均可免费使用。
products.description: Your customers ask ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and Claude before they ever reach Google. AI Visibility checks how those assistants talk about your brand: whether they name you, who they name instead, and which sources they trust. You get a visibility score, a competitor leaderboard, an AEO audit of your site, and a fix list you can act on the same day. Free to run on any brand and website.

products.name: Mochi Analytics
products.tagline: Analytics you would actually want to look at
products.summaryZh: 你真正想看的分析数据
products.descriptionZh: 大多数分析工具只告诉你谁访问了。Mochi告诉你哪些访问转化成了收入。连接Stripe后，每一美元都能追溯到带来它的渠道——自然流量、社交媒体、Product Hunt、Reddit上的某个帖子，只需一个页面，无需10多个仪表盘。一行代码，5分钟即可上线。此外还有热力图、漏斗、自定义事件、Search Console关键词以及独立的AI爬虫图表。14天免费试用，每月6.99美元起，所有套餐均包含全部功能。
products.description: Most analytics tell you who visited. Mochi tells you which visits became money. Connect Stripe and every dollar maps back to the channel that earned it - Organic, Social, Product Hunt, that one Reddit thread on one page, not 10+ dashboards. One line of script, live in 5 minutes. Plus heatmaps, funnels, custom events, Search Console keywords and a separate AI-crawler chart. Free for 14 days, from $6.99/mo, every feature on every plan.

products.name: Glimpse
products.tagline: Distilled Internet
products.summaryZh: 蒸馏互联网
products.descriptionZh: Glimpse 将长 YouTube 视频转化为简短的可视化摘要。搜索 YouTube 视频链接，一分钟内即可获得涵盖视频内容的清晰摘要信息图。每张信息图都按结构、层级和对比关系布局，一目了然。30分钟的视频变成30秒的浏览——无需花费数小时获取信息。Glimpse 设有发现信息流，是盲目刷屏的解毒剂。即时信息，你的浏览时间终于有了价值。
products.description: Glimpse turns long YouTube videos into short, visual summaries. Search for a YouTube video link and get a clear summarised infographic covering the video, within a minute. Each infographic is laid out with structure, hierarchy, and comparisons you can scan at a glance. A 30-minute video becomes a 30-second scan - you don't have to spend hours to gain information. Glimpse has a Discover feed. It's the antidote to mindless scrolling. Instant information. Your scroll time finally counts.

products.name: YourOnlyAI
products.tagline: Find the right tool, not the hype.
products.summaryZh: 找到合适的工具，而非追逐炒作。
products.descriptionZh: YourOnlyAI是一个AI推荐平台，其用户界面类似于现代LLM代理，内置提示增强器，可推荐最佳AI及最佳提示以获得最佳结果。
products.description: YourOnlyAI is an ai recommendation platform which resembles to the same ui of modern llm agents with built in prompt enhancer which suggests the best ai with the best prompt to get the best result.

products.name: Dcyde
products.tagline: Decision memory for you and your team
products.summaryZh: 你和团队的决策记忆
products.descriptionZh: 你怎么记录团队的决定？Slack 消息？邮件？还是再也不会翻开的笔记本？这些方式都会消失。六个月后，没人记得当初为什么这么做。Dcyde.app 是一个简单、可共享的决策记忆工具。直接从 Slack、Figma 或应用内固定决策及其背后的原因，之后还能真正找到它。无论你是独立开发者、小团队还是整个公司，无论是否懂技术，都适用。
products.description: How do you keep track of what your team decides? A Slack thread? An email? A notebook you'll never open again? They all vanish. Six months later, nobody remembers why. Dcyde.app is a simple, shareable memory for your decisions. Pin the decision and the why behind it, straight from Slack, Figma, or the app, and actually find it later. Solo developer, small team, or a whole company. Technical or not.

products.name: OGCanvas
products.tagline: A visual editor for dynamic Open Graph images
products.summaryZh: 动态Open Graph图像的视觉编辑器
products.descriptionZh: OGCanvas 将一份设计转化为网站所需的全部 Open Graph 图片。在可视化编辑器中创建精美的 1200×630 模板，让文字、图片和颜色动态变化，然后通过一个托管渲染链接为每个页面生成独特的预览。支持 30 个模板起步，可在社交平台预览链接，并导出 PNG、JPEG 或 WebP 格式。设计和下载完全免费，无水印，无需信用卡。
products.description: OGCanvas turns one design into every Open Graph image your site needs. Create a polished 1200×630 template in a visual editor, make text, images, and colors dynamic, then use one hosted render URL to generate a unique preview for each page. Start with 30 templates, preview links across social platforms, and export PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Free to design and download - no watermark or credit card required.

products.name: Layoutr — AI-furnishing
products.tagline: Plan your room layout at true scale
products.summaryZh: 以真实比例规划房间布局
products.descriptionZh: Layoutr 能在数秒内将任意户型图转化为带比例尺的家具布置房间。上传照片或扫描件后，AI视觉系统自动识别房间与墙体，并根据您对居住方式的描述，按真实尺寸完成空间布置。无需描摹、无需CAD、核心工具无需注册。您的户型图始终保留在本地设备中。
products.description: Layoutr turns any floor plan into a scaled, furnished room in seconds. Upload a photo or scan, and AI vision detects your rooms and walls automatically, then furnishes the space at true dimensions based on how you describe living there. No tracing, no CAD, no sign-up for the core tool. Your plans never leave your device.

products.name: ReelStack
products.tagline: Track your shows, know where to stream, get notified
products.summaryZh: 追踪你的节目，了解播放平台，获取通知。
products.descriptionZh: 我总在Netflix、Max、Hulu、Apple TV+和Prime之间搞混想看的剧，还总是几周后才得知新季上线。于是我做了ReelStack。添加一部剧或电影，它会告诉你哪个平台有资源，新季上线时立刻通知你。无需登录，没有社交功能，只有你的片单。一次性付费2.99美元，绝无订阅。
products.description: I kept losing track of what I wanted to watch across Netflix, Max, Hulu, Apple TV+, and Prime, and I'd always find out weeks late that a new season dropped. So I built ReelStack. Add a show or movie, it tells you which service has it, and it pings you the moment a new season is out. No login, nothing social, just your list. $2.99 once, no subscription, ever.

products.name: Plantory
products.tagline: The AI garden planner that knows your climate and soil
products.summaryZh: AI花园规划师，了解你的气候与土壤
products.descriptionZh: Plantory是一款AI花园规划工具。在按比例绘制的2D画布上设计花园，获取适合您气候和土壤的植物推荐，通过照片识别病害，并确保不错过霜冻预警。涵盖超过40万种植物，支持8种语言。免费试用14天，无需绑定银行卡。Product Hunt独家优惠：使用优惠码GARDENER50，首年可享五折优惠。
products.description: Plantory is an AI garden planner. Design your garden on a to-scale 2D canvas, get plant picks for your climate and soil, spot diseases from a photo, and never miss a frost alert. 400,000+ plants, 8 languages. Free 14-day trial, no card required. Product Hunt exclusive: 50% off your first year with code GARDENER50.

products.name: Long-term Software Governance
products.tagline: Keep commercial software reliable for the long run.
products.summaryZh: 确保商业软件长期稳定可靠。
products.descriptionZh: 让商业软件长期保持可靠。商业软件的价值源于持续使用，而非一次发布。我们为稳定性、迭代、安全和团队连续性建立长期机制。# 商业软件绝非一次性用品 AI缩短了首个版本的生产时间，但并未缩短软件对业务负责的年限。
products.description: Keep commercial software reliable for the long run. Commercial software creates value through continued use, not through a single launch. We establish long-term mechanisms for stability, iteration, security and team continuity. # Commercial Software Is Never Disposable AI has shortened the time required to produce a first version. It has not shortened the years for which software remains accountable to the business.

products.name: CONTRABAND VR Cinema
products.tagline: A theatrical experience with friends, from home.
products.summaryZh: 与朋友共享的剧场体验，从家中开始。
products.descriptionZh: 戴上你的Quest头显，走进一个真实的影院，与真实的观众一起，在同一时刻观看同一部电影。没有人暂停，也没有人快进。当片尾字幕滚动时，你可以投票决定下一部放映什么。这就是过去看电影的感觉。这就是虚拟影院。
products.description: Put on your Quest headset and step into a real cinema with a real audience, watching the same film at the same moment together. Nobody pauses and nobody skips ahead. When the credits roll, you vote on what screens next. This is what going to the movies used to feel like. This is Virtual Cinema.

products.name: Alson Shop
products.tagline: The AI-native bookstore for our storybooks
products.summaryZh: AI原生书店，专为我们的故事书打造
products.descriptionZh: Alson Shop是一个由GenAI驱动的插画故事书市场。顾客无需浏览无尽分类，只需与Alson Shop对话，即可找到适合自己的书籍。
products.description: Alson Shop is a GenAI-powered marketplace for illustrated storybooks. Instead of browsing endless categories, customers chat with Alson shop to find the right book for them.
